reviews.comment:
Una estación que tiene todo. Buena atención, baños impecables, mucho espacio para estacionar, servicio para inflar neumáticos funcionando bien. Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
A gas station that has everything. Great service, spotless restrooms, plenty of parking, and a working tire inflation system. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsMU5EdXJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La comida estuvo bien. Pero es un oasis en medio del calor de la provincia.

(Translated by Google)
The food was good. But it's an oasis in the heat of the province.

They could add more pumps. The waits are endless.

reviews.comment:
Muy amables todas las personas q trabajan alli, se me rompió la camioneta y todos se acercaron a preguntar si necesitaba algo. Me ayudaron a conseguir un electricista para poder arreglar mi vehículo.
El servicio de cafeteria es excelente.
Los baños siempre estan impecables, a cada rato los estan limpiando!

(Translated by Google)
Everyone who works there is very kind. My truck broke down, and everyone came over to ask if I needed anything. They even helped me find an electrician to fix my vehicle.
The cafeteria service is excellent.
The restrooms are always spotless; they're constantly being cleaned!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGcUl5T3B3RRAB

reviews.comment:

Good, there are places in stations with better prices in cafes.

reviews.comment:
Muy atento el personal, los baños impecables y el Shop muy surtido

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very attentive, the bathrooms were spotless, and the shop was very well-stocked.

reviews.comment:
La visité en 4 oportunidades en distintos meses del año, siempre tuve una espera de no.menos de 40', quizás necesitaría más personal.

(Translated by Google)
I visited it on 4 occasions in different months of the year, I always had a wait of no less than 40 minutes, perhaps it needs more staff.
